summary: ANDROID | Low battery notification shown on app cold start despite full battery
scenario: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on app cold start despite connected device having full/high battery level
description_clean: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on app cold start (first launch) even when the connected device has a full/high battery level. Expected behavior: no low battery notification should be shown if the device battery level is high.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (cold start / first launch after force close).
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) is connected with a full or high battery level.
3. Observe the Home screen for any low battery notification.
expected: No low battery notification is displayed on the Home screen when the connected device has a full or high battery level.
actual: A low battery notification incorrectly appears on the Home screen even though the connected device has a full/high battery level.
